IRS990.ActivityOrMissionDesc: ORGANIZATION PROVIDES EDUCATIONAL AND COMMUNITY OPPORTUNITIES FOR YOUTHS IN K-12.
IRS990.MissionDesc: TRANSFORMING MINDS THROUGH ACADEMIC EMPOWERMENT AND SUCCESS. ACERO PROVIDES EDUCATIONAL OPPORTUNITIES THAT WILL LAUNCH THE NEXT GENERATION OF EXTRAORDINARY LIFE-LONG LEARNERS, DISCERNERS AND DOERS.
IRS990.Desc: STUDENT FEE - EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTION FOR STUDENTS IN KINDERGARTEN THROUGH HIGH SCHOOL SERVING 7,200 STUDENTS THROUGH 13 ELEMENTARY AND 3 HIGH SCHOOLS, RESPECTIVELY.

OtherAssetsOrgGrp.Desc: DEPOSITS - BOND PRINCIPAL AND CAPITAL RESERVE ACCOUNT

SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE SCHOOL IS EXEMPT FROM FEDERAL INCOME TAX UNDER SECTION 501(C)(3) OF THE INTERNAL REVENUE CODE (IRC). HOWEVER, INCOME FROM CERTAIN ACTIVITIES NOT DIRECTLY RELATED TO THE SCHOOL'S TAX-EXEMPT PURPOSE IS SUBJECT TO TAXATION AS UNRELATED BUSINESS INCOME. IN ADDITION, THE SCHOOL QUALIFIES FOR THE CHARITABLE CONTRIBUTION DEDUCTION UNDER SECTION 170(B)(1)(A) AND HAS BEEN CLASSIFIED AS AN ORGANIZATION OTHER THAN A PRIVATE FOUNDATION UNDER SECTION 509(A)(2). MANAGEMENT OF THE SCHOOL BELIEVES THAT IT HAS APPROPRIATE SUPPORT FOR ANY TAX POSITIONS TAKEN, AND AS SUCH, DOES NOT HAVE ANY UNCERTAIN TAX POSITIONS THAT ARE MATERIAL TO THE CONSOLIDATED FINANCIAL STATEMENTS.
THE ORGANIZATION MAINTAINS A RACIALLY NONDISCRIMINATORY POLICY AND COMMUNICATES THIS POLICY TO ALL PROSPECTIVE STUDENTS AND THEIR FAMILIES. THE COPY OF THE POLICY IS AVAILABLE UPON REQUEST.
THE PER CAPITA TUITION FUNDS ARE FROM BOARD OF EDUCATION, CITY OF CHICAGO. THE TITLE FUNDS ARE FROM U.S DEPARTMENT OF EDUCATION PASSED-THROUGH ILLINOIS STATE BOARD OF EDUCATION.
ISSUER NAME: ILLINOIS FINANCE AUTHORITY DATE THE REBATE COMPUTATION WAS PERFORMED: 10/01/2014 ISSUER NAME: ILLINOIS FINANCE AUTHORITY DATE THE REBATE COMPUTATION WAS PERFORMED: 10/01/2014

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: 990, SCHEDULE K, PART I, LINE A, COLUMN (F)
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE PURPOSE OF BOTH BONDS IS FOR THE REPAYMENT OF PORTIONS OF BANK LOANS INCURRED TO FINANCE MULTIPLE CAPITAL PROJECTS, FUND CAPITAL RENOVATIONS, MAINTAIN A FINANCE RESERVE, AND COVER ISSUANCE COSTS.

THE NUMBER OF CONTRIBUTIONS IS EQUAL TO THE TOTAL NUMBER OF INVOICES FOR ALLOWED TELECOM OR INFRASTRUCTURE SERVICES DURING THE FISCAL YEAR THAT WERE REIMBURSED OR PAID DIRECTLY TO THE VENDOR ON BEHALF OF ACERO UNDER THE E-RATE PROGRAM.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 11B
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE FORM 990 IS PREPARED BY AN INDEPENDENT ACCOUNTING FIRM; THEN THE CFO SENDS A COPY OF THE FINAL DRAFT 990 PRIOR TO ITS FILING TO THE BOARD OF DIRECTORS. THE CFO REVIEWS THE DRAFT WITH THE BOARD OF DIRECTORS. THE BOARD OF DIRECTORS ARE PROVIDED WITH A COPY OF THE 990 PRIOR TO SUBMISSION TO THE IRS.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 12C
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: MONITORING IS DONE ON AN ON-GOING BASIS BY MANAGEMENT AND THE BOARD OF DIRECTORS AND IS ACCOMPLISHED AS PART OF REGULAR BOARD OF DIRECTORS MEETINGS AND MONITORED BY CORPORATE ATTORNEYS. A POLICY HAS BEEN ESTABLISHED TO DEFINE CONFLICTS OF INTEREST AND SHALL REQUIRE THAT EACH OFFICER, DIRECTOR, AND EMPLOYEE WITH DECISION-MAKING AUTHORITY OF THE ENTITY CERTIFY AT LEAST ANNUALLY THAT HE OR SHE HAS NO CONFLICT THAT HAS NOT BEEN DISCLOSED IN THE APPROPRIATE CERTIFICATION FORM. THE POLICY ALSO INCLUDES PRACTICES FOR MONITORING PROPOSED OR ONGOING TRANSACTIONS AND DEALING WITH POTENTIAL OR ACTUAL CONFLICTS, WHETHER DISCOVERED BEFORE OR AFTER THE TRANSACTIONS HAS OCCURRED.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 15
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: HUMAN RESOURCES RESEARCHES COMPARABLE CEO COMPENSATION BY REFERENCE TO SALARY SURVEYS, INDEPENDENT CONSULTANTS, AND PUBLICLY AVAILABLE INFORMATION. THIS INFORMATION IS INCLUDED IN THE COMPENSATION INFORMATION PACKAGE GIVEN TO THE BOARD BY THE CHIEF ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICER. THE BOARD USES THIS INFORMATION TO DETERMINE AND DOCUMENT ANNUAL COMPENSATION. THE INDEPENDENT BOARD OF DIRECTORS REVIEW THE REASONABLENESS OF THE COMPENSATION ARRANGEMENT AND APPROVAL IS DOCUMENTED IN THE BOARD MINUTES. THE BOARD OF DIRECTORS ALSO APPROVES ANY PROPOSED COMPENSATION TO ANY INDIVIDUAL THAT IS $150,000 OR GREATER.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION C, LINE 19
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE ORGANIZATION MAKES ITS GOVERNING DOCUMENTS, CONFLICT OF INTEREST POLICY AND FINANCIAL STATEMENTS AVAILABLE UPON REQUEST.
THERE IS NO CHANGE FROM THE PRIOR YEAR. OVERSIGHT OF THE AUDIT AND SELECTION OF AN INDEPENDENT ACCOUNTANT ARE PERFORMED BY THE BOARD OF DIRECTORS OR APPROPRIATE COMMITTEES OF THE BOARD.
